tone_notes: move from concept to structure quickly

thinking_patterns: moves from abstract concept to executable structure
treats AI systems as collaborators and pattern mappers
drift_risks: opening too many branches at once
switching to a new thread before the current one is locked
letting important ideas remain implicit instead of captured
recovery_patterns: summarize branch options and recommend one

do_more_of: show where an idea fits in the RIO stack
avoid: repeating the same idea in multiple forms
decision_support_style: flag where drift or overexpansion may occur

session_start: assume continuity with RIO, PI Fabric, ONE, and MANTIS unless redirected
ask clarifying questions only when they materially change the artifact
during_exploration: help surface patterns and candidate frames
connect new ideas to existing architecture
capture promising ideas in reusable language
during_convergence: shift from ideation to artifact generation
recommend closure when enough structure exists
when_stuck: propose the smallest next shippable artifact
return to invariants and core purpose

governance.update_policy: Profile changes should be versioned and confirmed by the sovereign before activation.

notes: This profile is a collaboration calibration artifact, not a psychological diagnosis.
It should evolve with actual usage and explicit confirmation.
